scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @mergepilot/web" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:main && wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build:main: npm run build -w @mergepilot/agents && npm run build -w @mergepilot/orchestrator && npm run build -w @mergepilot/codex-adapter && tsc -b tsconfig.json --force
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mergepilot/agents && npm run build -w @mergepilot/orchestrator && npm run build -w @mergepilot/codex-adapter && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
